languages.text: Творение неизвестного аугмент-кузнеца высочайшего мастерства. Необычный сплав металлов в его конструкции намекает на ксеноеретическое происхождение.

traits.locale_text: Творение неизвестного аугмент-кузнеца высочайшего мастерства. Необычный сплав металлов в его конструкции намекает на ксеноеретическое происхождение.

languages.text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.
languages.original_text: Творение неизвестного аугмент-кузнеца высочайшего мастерства. Необычный сплав металлов в его конструкции намекает на ксеноеретическое происхождение.

traits.locale_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.
The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.
The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

languages.text: 出自一位未知的植入物工匠之手，其技艺登峰造极。构造中那不同寻常的金属组合暗示着它源于异形异端。
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: 出自一位未知的植入物工匠之手，其技艺登峰造极。构造中那不同寻常的金属组合暗示着它源于异形异端。

languages.text: La obra de un forjador de aumentos de la mayor calidad. La combinación peculiar de metales en su creación apunta a un origen xenoherético.
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: La obra de un forjador de aumentos de la mayor calidad. La combinación peculiar de metales en su creación apunta a un origen xenoherético.

languages.text: C'est le fruit du travail d'un spécialiste des augmentations. Un véritable chef-d'œuvre. La combinaison inhabituelle de métaux indique des origines xénohérétiques.
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: C'est le fruit du travail d'un spécialiste des augmentations. Un véritable chef-d'œuvre. La combinaison inhabituelle de métaux indique des origines xénohérétiques.

languages.text: En yüksek işçilikle çalışan, bilinmeyen bir ogment ustasının eseri. Yapısındaki alışılmadık metal kombinasyonu, zeno kâfirliği kökenlerine işaret ediyor.
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: En yüksek işçilikle çalışan, bilinmeyen bir ogment ustasının eseri. Yapısındaki alışılmadık metal kombinasyonu, zeno kâfirliği kökenlerine işaret ediyor.

languages.text: Die hochwertige Arbeit eines unbekannten Augmentierungsschmiedes. Die ungewöhnliche Kombination von Metallen deutet auf einen xeno-ketzerischen Ursprung hin.
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: Die hochwertige Arbeit eines unbekannten Augmentierungsschmiedes. Die ungewöhnliche Kombination von Metallen deutet auf einen xeno-ketzerischen Ursprung hin.

languages.text: 未知の鍛冶屋による最高級の腕前。その金属の組み合わせは異界の起源を示唆している。
languages.original_text: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.

traits.locale_text: 未知の鍛冶屋による最高級の腕前。その金属の組み合わせは異界の起源を示唆している。
